roa.docketEntryComment: /AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ2D/CTS:2/DNA/X:DEF SHALL NOT HOLD A POSITION OF TRUST FOR ELDER ADULTS PUR 368GPC OR DEPENDENT ADULTS PUR 368HPC/X:DEF SHALL NOT POSSESS OR EXECUTE ANY CHECK OR OTHE FINANCIAL DOCUMENTS WHICH ARE IN THE NAME OF ANOTHER/X:DEF SHALL NOT BE EMPLOYED AS A CARETAKER EMPLOYED IN ANY CAPACITY IN A BOARD AND CARE FACILITY/WS/X:AFTER 6 MONTHS SUCCESSFUL PROBAND NO NEW ARRESTS, DEF MAY MOVE TO HAVE MATTER REDUCED TO MISDEMEANOR PUR 17BPC/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/OBEY/ACCEP/
/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1//FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:04-14-05/
